channel.title: Zhijie Xia
channel.description: Technical blog about LeetCode, CUDA, reinforcement learning, DevOps, and competitive programming.

item.title: Address off-policy training in VERL
item.description: Addressing off-policy training challenges in VERL for reinforcement learning with LLMs.

item.title: Cuda implementation for mutiplication to illustrate CUTLASS
item.description: A deep dive into CUDA matrix multiplication and how CUTLASS optimizes GPU kernels.

item.title: CPSC 599 Competitive Programming
item.description: Course notes and problem-solving strategies from CPSC 599 Competitive Programming at the University of Calgary.

item.title: September 2023 Daily Leetcode: Grind 75 in Python
item.description: Working through the Grind 75 LeetCode problems in Python during September 2023.

item.title: Crash course on tmux
item.description: A quick reference guide and crash course on using tmux for terminal multiplexing.

item.title: Feb 2023 Daily Leetcode: Leetcode in C++/RUST
item.description: Daily LeetCode problems solved in C++ and Rust throughout February 2023.

item.title: Advent of Code 2022
item.description: My solutions and walkthroughs for Advent of Code 2022 challenges.

item.title: Jan 2023 Daily Leetcode: Leetcode in Rust/C++
item.description: Daily LeetCode problems solved in Rust and C++ throughout January 2023.

item.title: Hello World: new dev blog in NextJS
item.description: Welcome to my newly redesigned personal developer blog built with NextJS.
